texts.label: text
texts.orig: Problem Selection List Enhancements (Patches OR*3.0*429 and GMPL*2.0*49) Deployment, Installation, Back-Out, and Rollback Guide
texts.text: Problem Selection List Enhancements (Patches OR*3.0*429 and GMPL*2.0*49) Deployment, Installation, Back-Out, and Rollback Guide

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Problem Selection List Enhancements will be released as part of a combined multi-package build under PROBLEM SELECTION LIST BUILD 1.0. This combined build consists of the GMPL*2.0*49 and OR*3.0*429 patches. The patches are expected to be installed on existing VistA platforms.
texts.text: The Problem Selection List Enhancements will be released as part of a combined multi-package build under PROBLEM SELECTION LIST BUILD 1.0. This combined build consists of the GMPL*2.0*49 and OR*3.0*429 patches. The patches are expected to be installed on existing VistA platforms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are no known issues with Problem Selection List Enhancements.
texts.text: There are no known issues with Problem Selection List Enhancements.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Problem Selection List Enhancements include new features and changes include
texts.text: Problem Selection List Enhancements include new features and changes include

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A new parameter ORQQPL SELECTION LIST
texts.text: A new parameter ORQQPL SELECTION LIST

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The migration of existing lists if they are actively assigned
texts.text: The migration of existing lists if they are actively assigned

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The installation of a new VA National Problem Selection List
texts.text: The installation of a new VA National Problem Selection List

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A CAC, or appropriate person, can assign a Problem Selection List that will display on the left of the Problems tab. If a list is assigned, there will be a listing of categories and when the category is selected, the pane below displays the problems it contains.  This screen capture shows the VA-National Problem Selection List Content.
texts.text: A CAC, or appropriate person, can assign a Problem Selection List that will display on the left of the Problems tab. If a list is assigned, there will be a listing of categories and when the category is selected, the pane below displays the problems it contains.  This screen capture shows the VA-National Problem Selection List Content.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A new key GMPL IMPRT UTIL that will enable the users to import problem selection lists
texts.text: A new key GMPL IMPRT UTIL that will enable the users to import problem selection lists

texts.label: text
texts.orig: updates to the Problem Selection List menu items
texts.text: updates to the Problem Selection List menu items

texts.label: text
texts.orig: additions and updates to menu actions that assist in the creation and maintenance of selection lists
texts.text: additions and updates to menu actions that assist in the creation and maintenance of selection lists

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For users that only use CPRS, the only change they may see would be in the problem selection list they are assigned.
texts.text: For users that only use CPRS, the only change they may see would be in the problem selection list they are assigned.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Users who work on problem list creation and assignments will see new menu options, including the ability to import problem selection lists for those who have been assigned the GMPL IMPRT UTIL key.
texts.text: Users who work on problem list creation and assignments will see new menu options, including the ability to import problem selection lists for those who have been assigned the GMPL IMPRT UTIL key.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ORQQPL SELECTION LIST is a new parameter that will contain the problem selection list assignments. During the installation process, any existing problem selection lists that are actively assigned will be moved from where they are now stored to this new parameter.
texts.text: ORQQPL SELECTION LIST is a new parameter that will contain the problem selection list assignments. During the installation process, any existing problem selection lists that are actively assigned will be moved from where they are now stored to this new parameter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: When the patches are installed, the VA National Problem Selection List will be assigned at the Package level. Unless some other active assignment exists, all users and clinics will use the national list. If sites choose, they may make other assignments.
texts.text: When the patches are installed, the VA National Problem Selection List will be assigned at the Package level. Unless some other active assignment exists, all users and clinics will use the national list. If sites choose, they may make other assignments.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Assignments can be made at the following levels starting at the most general and going to the most specific: Package, System, Division, Location, and User. Package is only set by a nationally released patch. As with all parameters, the more specific level always takes priority over the more general assignment. So, if no other problem selection lists are assigned, all levels will inherit the Package level national list. However any assignment to a more specific level overrides the more general. So an assignment at Division or User overrides the Package level.
texts.text: Assignments can be made at the following levels starting at the most general and going to the most specific: Package, System, Division, Location, and User. Package is only set by a nationally released patch. As with all parameters, the more specific level always takes priority over the more general assignment. So, if no other problem selection lists are assigned, all levels will inherit the Package level national list. However any assignment to a more specific level overrides the more general. So an assignment at Division or User overrides the Package level.
